dalio.philosophy: 全天候型戦略 — あらゆる経済環境を乗り越えるために設計された分散ポートフォリオ。成長、景気後退、インフレ、デフレの4つのシナリオをカバーすることが鍵。
dalio.strategy: 株式30%＋長期債券40%＋中期債券15%＋金7.5%＋コモディティ7.5%。相関の低い資産を組み合わせることで、あらゆる環境での損失を最小化。
dalio.key_principle: 「痛み＋振り返り＝成長」 — 損失から学び原則を確立する。真の成功は正しい意思決定システムから生まれる。
dalio.track: 2008年金融危機時+9.5%のリターン。運用資産1,500億ドル、30年間平均年12%リターン。ヘッジファンド史上最高のトータルリターン。

buffett.full_name: ウォーレン・バフェット
buffett.philosophy: Value Investing — A long-term compounding strategy of buying below intrinsic value and holding for the long term. "If you aren't willing to own a stock for 10 years, don't even think about owning it for 10 minutes."
buffett.strategy: 優良企業への集中投資（AAPL、OXY、BRKなど）。常に25%の現金を維持。理解できないビジネスには投資しない「能力の輪」原則。
buffett.key_principle: "Be fearful when others are greedy, and greedy when others are fearful." Contrarian investing that turns market fear into opportunity.
buffett.track: 過去58年間の平均年間リターン+19.8%。1964年に投資した1万ドルは現在1.4億ドルに。S&P 500を3倍上回る超過リターン。

cathie_wood.philosophy: Disruptive Innovation Investing — Focused on technologies that will change the world in 5 years: AI, blockchain, genomics, space, and more. Short-term volatility is the price of innovation.
cathie_wood.strategy: 成長株への集中投資（TSLA、COIN、ROKU、PATHなど）。分散投資を最小限に、確信度に応じてポジションを拡大。5年以上の長期保有原則。
cathie_wood.key_principle: "Innovation doesn't grow linearly, it grows exponentially." Today's expensive stock can become tomorrow's bargain.
cathie_wood.track: ARK Innovation ETF +152% in 2020. Long-term AI optimism, Bitcoin $1.5M price target.

druckenmiller.philosophy: マクロトレンド＋集中投資 — マクロ経済の流れを読み、確信度が高い時に一方向に大きく賭ける。「正しい判断に消極的に賭けることは無意味だ。」
druckenmiller.strategy: トップダウンマクロ：金利、為替、財政政策を分析→高確率の非対称的機会を特定→レバレッジをかけた集中投資。間違えたら即損切り、正しければ追加。
druckenmiller.key_principle: 「重要なのは正しい頻度ではなく、正しい時にいくら稼ぐかだ。」リターンの非対称性は勝率よりも重要。
druckenmiller.track: 30 consecutive years of average +30% returns, never a negative year. Over $1B profit from shorting the British pound with Soros in 1992. $12B in assets when Duquesne closed.

help.title: ヘルプ
help.faq_a1: baln is an investment education app where you build your own investment principles by reading daily 5-minute market context, participating in predictions, and reviewing outcomes. It is not a trading app.
help.faq_a2: The Context Card helps you understand why your assets moved today through 4-layer analysis (historical context, macro chain, institutional behavior, portfolio impact) in 5 minutes. It auto-updates every 3 hours.
help.faq_q3: How do I participate in the prediction game?
help.faq_a3: 毎日3つの市場予測質問にYES/NOで投票します。翌日に結果と解説を確認。正解の予測で3どんぐり獲得。
help.faq_a4: 1どんぐり＝₩100。チェックイン（2どんぐり）、正解予測（3どんぐり）、共有（5どんぐり）で無料獲得。マーケットプレイスでAI分析追加（1どんぐり）、プレミアム体験（5どんぐり）などに使用。
help.faq_q5: AIヘルスチェックはどのように機能しますか？
help.faq_a5: AI analyzes 7 factors including diversification, volatility, and concentration, rating your portfolio from A+ to F. It also provides a prescription with specific improvement steps.
help.faq_a6: AIがウォーレン・バフェット、レイ・ダリオ、キャシー・ウッド、スタンレー・ドラッケンミラーなど世界的投資家の哲学を分析し、今日の市場に適用したデイリーインサイトを提供します。
help.faq_a7: We operate on a Zero-Knowledge principle. We do not collect brokerage passwords or account numbers. All data is encrypted with TLS 1.3 + AES-256.
help.faq_q8: What are the benefits of a Premium subscription?
help.faq_a8: 4層コンテキストカード分析フル版、予測解説＋復習、AI診断3回/日、機関投資家行動分析、同世代比較フル版、月間30どんぐりボーナス。月額₩4,900。

terms.doc_title: baln サービス 利用約款
terms.s1_body: These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your access to and use of the portfolio management and investment education service ("Service") provided by Baln Inc. ("Company"). By using the Service, you agree to be bound by these Terms.
terms.s2_body:
The Service includes:
1. Portfolio tracking and visualization
2. AI-based asset analysis
3. Context Cards — daily market context explained through 4 lenses (historical, macro, institutional, portfolio)
4. Prediction Game — AI-generated market quizzes and review
5. Real-time market news feed and portfolio impact analysis
6. Rebalancing suggestions and simulations
7. Acorn-based AI premium features
8. Other portfolio-related services
terms.s3_warning: ⚠️ Risk Warning: You may lose some or all of your invested principal.
terms.s3_body:
1. The Service is an educational tool and does not constitute investment advice, a solicitation, or an offer to buy or sell any security or financial instrument. The Company is not a registered investment adviser.

2. All content provided by the Service (AI analysis, rebalancing suggestions, tax calculations, stock analysis, etc.) is for general informational and educational purposes only. You are solely responsible for your investment decisions.

3. The Company is not liable for any direct or indirect investment losses arising from use of the Service.

4. AI analysis results are based on historical data and statistical models. Past performance does not guarantee future results. Actual outcomes may differ materially from analysis.

5. The Service is not insured or guaranteed by any government deposit protection scheme. Principal is not guaranteed.

6. Any tax-related information is provided for reference purposes only. Please consult a qualified tax professional for advice specific to your situation. Tax laws may change without notice.
terms.s4_body: The Company protects your personal information in accordance with applicable law. Please review our Privacy Policy for details on how we collect, use, and protect your information.
terms.s5_body:
以下に該当する場合、サービスへのアクセスが一時停止または終了される場合があります：
1. 他人になりすます、または他のユーザーの認証情報を悪用する
2. サービスの運営を妨害する
3. 適用法令に違反する
4. 当社が定めるその他の規則に違反する
terms.s6_body:
1. The VIP Lounge gathering feature is a peer-matching platform for voluntary meetups. The Company is not the organizer of any gathering.

2. The Company is not responsible for any accident, dispute, or loss arising from gatherings facilitated through the Service.

3. All risks and responsibilities relating to participation in gatherings rest solely with the participants.

4. A 10% platform fee applies to paid gathering registrations and will be disclosed at checkout.

5. Cancellation and refund policies for individual gatherings are determined by the gathering host.
terms.s7_body_intro: サービスを以下の目的で使用してはなりません：
terms.s7_item_a_desc: : direct unspecified individuals to buy or sell specific securities, or engage in unregistered investment advisory activities.
terms.s7_item_b_desc: : use expressions such as "guaranteed principal", "fixed return of X%", or "100% profit".
terms.s7_item_c_desc: : direct users to external messaging apps (KakaoTalk, Telegram, etc.) to solicit investments or request money.
terms.s7_item_d_desc: : accept compensation for investment recommendations without proper regulatory registration.
terms.s7_penalty_suffix: が科され、関係当局への通報が行われる場合があります。
terms.s8_body:
1. どんぐりはAIプレミアム機能へのアクセスに使用されるアプリ内ポイントです。1どんぐり≈$0.08 USD相当。

2. 購入したどんぐりは、未使用の場合、購入後7日以内に返金可能です。

3. 使用済み（差し引き済み）のどんぐりは返金不可です。

4. サブスクリプションボーナスどんぐりおよびプロモーションどんぐりは返金不可です。

5. 技術的なエラーによりAI分析が配信されなかった場合、差し引かれたどんぐりは自動的に復元されます。

6. どんぐりは最後の獲得日から1年後に失効します。失効30日前に通知されます。

7. どんぐりは現金、ギフトカード、その他の支払い形式に交換できず、他のユーザーに譲渡できません。

8. 返金リクエスト：baln.logic@gmail.com またはアプリ内サポートまで。
terms.s9_body:
1. You must be at least 14 years old (or the minimum age required by the laws of your jurisdiction) to use this Service.

2. If the Company discovers that a user is under the minimum age, the account will be suspended and relevant data deleted.
terms.s10_body:
1. The Company uses AI to automatically analyze portfolio data (risk assessment, rebalancing suggestions, etc.).

2. You may opt out of automated AI analysis by disabling the feature in Settings.

3. AI analysis does not automatically execute investment transactions. All final investment decisions are made by you.

4. Your account may be assigned a tier classification based on activity and portfolio data, which may affect access to certain features.
terms.footer:
これらの利用規約に同意しない場合、サービスをご利用いただけません。
これらの利用規約は適用法に準拠します。韓国のユーザーの場合、準拠法は大韓民国法であり、管轄裁判所はソウル中央地方裁判所です。

privacy.screen_title: プライバシーポリシー
privacy.banner_subtitle: あなたの秘密を私たちは見ません
privacy.policy_zero_knowledge_desc: We do not collect or store your actual asset holdings, trading passwords, or brokerage login credentials. The app analyzes screenshot images only, and original images are deleted immediately after processing.
privacy.policy_encryption_desc: All data is encrypted in transit using TLS 1.3 and stored with AES-256 encryption. Encryption keys are generated and managed solely on your device.
privacy.policy_local_title: ローカルファースト処理
privacy.policy_local_desc: All calculations and analysis are performed on-device wherever possible. Only anonymized data is sent to our servers when AI analysis is required.
privacy.policy_anon_desc: Data sent for AI analysis has all personally identifiable information removed. Only ticker symbols and quantities are used — no account numbers or real names are ever transmitted.
privacy.policy_delete_title: データ 削除 権利
privacy.policy_delete_desc: You can delete all your data at any time. Go to Settings > Security > Delete Account to permanently erase all data. Deleted data cannot be recovered.
privacy.policy_no_share_desc: お客様のデータは広告、マーケティング、その他の第三者目的で販売・共有されることはありません。法的要求があっても暗号化データのみが存在するため、意味のある開示は不可能です。
privacy.data_item_email_purpose: アカウント作成・ログイン
privacy.data_item_portfolio_retention: ユーザー 削除 可能
privacy.data_item_payment_retention: 決済代行業者が保管（5年間）
privacy.data_item_community_retention: ユーザー 削除 可能
privacy.purpose_body:
We process personal data for the following purposes. Data will not be used for any purpose beyond those listed below. If the purpose changes, we will obtain separate consent as required under applicable data protection law (including GDPR and CCPA).

1. Account registration & management: verifying intent to register, identifying and authenticating users, maintaining membership, preventing service misuse
2. Service delivery: portfolio management, AI-powered asset analysis, rebalancing recommendations, context card delivery, prediction game operation
3. Marketing & analytics: providing event information and promotional content (with consent), analyzing usage statistics and access frequency
4. Customer support: verifying the identity of complainants, investigating inquiries, communicating findings, and notifying outcomes
privacy.ai_decision_section_title: AI自動意思決定とプロファイリング
privacy.ai_decision_body:
We perform automated AI analysis (risk assessment, rebalancing suggestions, tax calculations, guru insights, etc.) based on your portfolio data.

Under applicable data protection law (including GDPR Article 22), you have the right to request an explanation of, or to object to, any fully automated decision-making.

• Opt out of AI analysis: Settings > Security > Disable AI Auto-Analysis
• Request an explanation: contact baln.logic@gmail.com

AI analysis never executes investment decisions automatically — all final decisions remain entirely yours.
privacy.cross_border_supabase_purpose:
データベース
ホスティング
privacy.cross_border_detail:
■ Data sent to Google Gemini AI:
• Portfolio ticker symbols and weights (e.g., AAPL 30%)
• Market data (prices, exchange rates, indices)
• Health score and risk factors

■ Data never sent:
• Name, email, account numbers, or other personally identifiable information
• Actual holdings amounts or transaction history

■ Safeguards:
• All data is transmitted with TLS 1.3 encryption
• Google Gemini API does not use your data to train its models (Google Cloud API Terms of Service)
• You can withdraw consent for AI data sharing in Settings at any time

All sub-processors hold GDPR compliance certifications and SOC 2 Type II attestation.
privacy.rights_section_title: あなたのデータに関する権利
privacy.rights_body:
Under applicable data protection law (including GDPR and CCPA), you have the following rights:

1. Right to access your personal data
2. Right to correct or delete your personal data
3. Right to restrict processing
4. Right to object to automated decision-making

How to exercise your rights:
• In-app: Settings > Security > Delete Account (processed immediately)
• Email: privacy@baln.app (within 10 business days)
• Mail: Contact our Data Protection Officer at the address below
privacy.dpo_intro: In accordance with applicable data protection regulations, we have designated a Data Protection Officer (DPO) responsible for overseeing personal data processing and handling data subject complaints and remediation.
privacy.dpo_name: ・氏名：全知赫 代表取締役
privacy.deletion_body: 個人データが不要になった場合、すなわち保持期間の満了または処理目的の達成後、遅滞なく削除します。
privacy.deletion_procedure_body: 登録時に入力された情報は、目的達成後に別のデータベースに移され、内部方針または適用法で要求される期間保持された後、永久に削除されます。別のデータベース内のデータは、法律で定められた目的以外には使用されません。
privacy.deletion_method_body:
• Electronic files: deleted using technical methods that prevent restoration; database records are destroyed in a non-recoverable manner (logical deletion followed by physical overwrite).
  • Paper documents: shredded or incinerated.
  • AI analysis logs: automatically and permanently deleted 30 days after creation.
  • Backup data: purged from backup copies within 30 days of deleting the original.
privacy.deletion_legal_heading: 3. 法律で要求される保持
privacy.deletion_legal_body:
・契約または申込撤回に関する記録：5年間（電子商取引法）
  ・代金決済および商品供給に関する記録：5年間（電子商取引法）
  ・消費者の苦情または紛争解決に関する記録：3年間（電子商取引法）
  ・通信確認記録：12ヶ月間（通信秘密保護法）
  ・ログイン記録：3ヶ月間（通信秘密保護法）
privacy.security_intro: 適用法に基づき、個人データを保護するため以下の技術的・管理的・物理的安全措置を実施しています。
privacy.security_admin_body:
・内部データ管理計画の策定と実施
  ・個人データにアクセスする人員の最小化と定期的な研修
  ・定期的な内部セキュリティ監査
privacy.security_tech_body:
• Encryption: all data transmitted via TLS 1.3 and stored with AES-256 encryption
  • Anti-hacking measures: intrusion detection systems, security software installation and updates
  • Access control: management of access privileges to data processing systems and retention of access logs
  • Access log retention and tamper prevention: access logs kept for at least 1 year
privacy.security_physical_body: • As a cloud-based service, physical servers are managed by Supabase Inc. (AWS infrastructure) and meet SOC 2 Type II certification standards.
privacy.auto_collect_intro: パーソナライズされたサービスを提供するため、利用情報を保存・取得する技術を使用する場合があります。
privacy.auto_collect_items_heading: 1. 自動収集されるデータ
privacy.auto_collect_items_body:
• App usage statistics (screen views, feature usage frequency)
  • Device information (OS version, app version)
  • Authentication tokens (to maintain login state)
privacy.auto_collect_purpose_body:
• Service usage analysis and improvement
  • Personalized service delivery
  • Maintaining login state
privacy.auto_collect_opt_out_body:
• You can clear app data in your device settings or reinstall the app to reset automatically collected information.
  • Note: opting out of automatic data collection may limit certain features such as staying logged in.
privacy.dispute_line1: データ保護に関する権利が侵害されたと思われる場合、お住まいの地域のデータ保護当局に苦情を申し立てる権利があります。
privacy.dispute_line2: EU/EEA users: contact your national data protection supervisory authority (e.g., the Irish DPC at dataprotection.ie).
privacy.dispute_line3: California residents (CCPA): contact the California Privacy Protection Agency at oag.ca.gov/privacy.
privacy.dispute_line4: You may also contact us directly at privacy@baln.app before filing a formal complaint.
privacy.changes_section_title: プライバシーポリシーの変更
privacy.changes_body:
1. This Privacy Policy is effective as of February 21, 2026.

2. Previous versions of this Privacy Policy:
  • This is the initial version; no prior versions exist.

3. If this Privacy Policy is updated, we will notify you via in-app notice at least 7 days before the changes take effect. For material changes affecting your rights, we will provide at least 30 days' notice.

drift.summary: Measures how far each asset's weight has drifted from your original purchase or target allocation.
drift.when_high:
Each asset is within 5% of its target weight.
Your portfolio is running as originally planned.
drift.when_low:
You haven't set target weights yet, or certain assets have moved significantly.
⚠️ Score is 0 if no target allocation is set.
drift.formula:
Sum of |actual weight − target weight| for each asset ÷ 2
→ 100 pts if drift is 0%, 0 pts if drift ≥ 25%
drift.data_source: Your manually entered asset prices + target weights (%) you've set per asset
drift.tip: Enter target weights (%) in the Analysis tab detail view to raise this score.

concentration.summary: Measures whether risk is spread across assets rather than concentrated in any single one.
concentration.when_high:
No single asset accounts for more than 40% of total risk.
Even if one asset crashes, the overall damage is limited.
concentration.when_low:
One asset is carrying more than half your total portfolio risk.
If that asset drops 30%, your entire portfolio is significantly impacted.
concentration.formula:
HHI concentration index of each asset's risk contribution (value × volatility)
→ 100 pts when evenly spread, 0 pts when fully concentrated
concentration.data_source:
Your entered asset prices + standard volatility by asset type
(e.g. Korean stocks 30%, crypto 80%, bonds 5%)
concentration.tip: Trim the largest position and add bonds, cash, or other asset classes.

correlation.summary: Measures whether your assets move in different directions. The more independently they move, the better the diversification.
correlation.when_high:
Assets move independently — like bonds rising when stocks fall.
Some assets act as a buffer when markets turn.
correlation.when_low:
All your assets move in the same direction.
Holding only stocks, crypto, and growth names means everything rises and falls together.
correlation.formula:
Weighted average of historical correlations between asset types by weight
→ 100 pts if avg correlation ≤ −0.3, 0 pts if ≥ 0.8
correlation.data_source:
Historical correlation coefficients by asset-type pair (built-in reference values)
Examples: Stocks↔Bonds −0.1, Stocks↔Crypto +0.5, Stocks↔Gold +0.1
correlation.tip: Add assets that tend to move opposite to stocks — bonds, gold, or cash.

volatility.summary: Measures how much your total portfolio value fluctuates.
volatility.when_high:
Annual price swings are under 18%.
Your portfolio holds relatively stable even during market turbulence.
volatility.when_low:
Annual price swings exceed 30%.
High crypto or growth stock exposure creates psychological pressure and panic-sell risk.
volatility.formula:
Weighted average of annual volatility per asset type × holding weight
→ 100 pts if < 18%, 0 pts if ≥ 30%
volatility.data_source:
Standard annual volatility by asset type (built-in reference values)
Examples: Korean stocks 30% / bonds 5% / crypto 80% / cash 0%
volatility.tip: Reduce crypto or individual growth stock exposure; increase bond ETFs and cash to lower swings.

downside.summary: Measures how many of your assets are currently at a loss.
downside.when_high:
Few or no assets are at a loss.
Most of your portfolio is at or above your cost basis.
downside.when_low:
A significant portion of your portfolio is sitting at a loss.
Further declines can compound losses.
downside.formula:
Weighted average of (cost basis − current price) ÷ cost basis × holding weight for losing assets
→ 100 pts if no losses, 0 pts if weighted loss ≥ 33%
downside.data_source: Your manually entered cost basis (purchase price) + current asset value
downside.tip: For a long-term strategy, consider averaging down. For shorter-term, set a clear stop-loss level.

tax.summary: Measures how well you're utilizing tax-loss harvesting opportunities.
tax.when_high:
No assets are down more than 5%, or you've already harvested losses.
Your tax efficiency is optimized.
tax.when_low:
Several assets are down more than 5%.
Selling them before year-end can offset gains elsewhere and reduce your tax bill.
tax.formula:
Number of assets down ≥ 5% ÷ total liquid assets
→ 100 pts if no harvesting opportunities, 0 pts if more than half qualify
tax.data_source: Your manually entered cost basis + current asset value
tax.tip: Sell losing assets then immediately buy similar ones — you keep your position while capturing the tax benefit.

leverage.summary: Measures whether debt or leverage is being used at a safe level.
leverage.when_high:
No debt, or LTV is below 60% on stable assets (e.g. real estate).
No forced liquidation risk even if values decline.
leverage.when_low:
You're using leverage on high-volatility assets (crypto, growth stocks).
A sharp drop could trigger forced liquidation (margin call).
leverage.formula:
LTV × asset volatility × asset value, summed across holdings ÷ total portfolio
→ 100 pts if risk metric < 10%, approaches 0 as it rises
leverage.data_source: Your entered loan-to-value ratio + asset price + standard volatility per asset type
leverage.tip: Only use leverage on stable assets like real estate. Leveraged volatile assets carry extreme risk.

large_cap.title: 📈 株式（大型株）
large_cap.role: ポートフォリオの成長エンジン。企業収益に連動する生産的な資産です。
large_cap.dalio: ダリオ：「成長+安定インフレ環境で最強。しかし不況時は50%以上下落する可能性 — 分散投資が不可欠。」
large_cap.buffett: バフェット：「株式は最高の資産クラスだ。90%をS&P500インデックスに。10年以上保有すればほぼ確実に勝つ。」
large_cap.when_good: 景気拡大期、金利安定、企業収益好調時
large_cap.tip: 両者とも株式保有に賛成。40%目標を維持。バフェットはもっと高くしたいが、ダリオは分散のため40%が適切と主張。

bond.title: 🏛️ 債券
bond.role: ポートフォリオのセーフティネット。株式が下落すると上昇する傾向があります。
bond.dalio: ダリオ：「不況とデフレの王者。All Weatherの要 — 55%を推奨。」
bond.buffett: バフェット：「債券は今、最悪の投資だ。インフレが来ると、債券投資家は税金と購買力の二重の損失に直面する。」
bond.when_good: 不況時、デフレ、金利低下局面（金利↓ ＝ 債券価格↑）
bond.when_bad: インフレ、急激な金利上昇時（2022年：債券-17%、歴史的最悪）
bond.tip: ダリオは55%希望、バフェットは最小化。妥協案：15% — 極端な下落時のバッファーとしてのみ保有。

bitcoin.title: ₿ ビットコイン
bitcoin.role: デジタルゴールド。発行上限（2,100万枚）によりインフレヘッジ＋高リスク成長資産。
bitcoin.dalio: ダリオ（2024年）：「少量のビットコインを持つのは合理的。デジタル価値保存手段として認識。」
bitcoin.buffett: バフェット：「ネズミ取りの毒の二乗。何も生産しない。100ドルでも買わない。」 — 2024年も姿勢変わらず。
bitcoin.when_good: 流動性過剰、インフレ懸念、機関投資家の参入時
bitcoin.when_bad: 急激な利上げ、規制強化、市場全体のパニック（高ベータ）
bitcoin.tip: 両者の最大の意見対立。ダリオ：1-3% vs バフェット：0%。実用的な妥協案：10% — リスク許容度に応じて判断を。

altcoin.title: アルトコイン
altcoin.role: ハイリスク・ハイリターンの投機的資産。ビットコインの3〜5倍の変動率。
altcoin.dalio: ダリオ：「直接的な言及なし。しかし投機的資産は全体の5%未満に厳格に制限すべき。」
altcoin.buffett: バフェット：「理解できないものには投資しない。アルトコインはカジノと変わらない。何も生産しない。」
altcoin.when_good: 強気相場、ビットコイン上昇後のアルトコインシーズン
altcoin.when_bad: 弱気相場 — ビットコインより遥かに大きく下落（90%以上の損失も）
altcoin.tip: 両者とも強く反対。5%の上限を守ること — 含み損時のタックスロスハーベスティングにのみ活用。

gold.title: 金・貴金属
gold.role: 5,000年の価値保存。ドル安、インフレ、地政学的危機で上昇。
gold.dalio: ダリオ：「すべてのポートフォリオに金を。印刷されない唯一の本当のお金。インフレと危機に対する究極のヘッジ。」
gold.buffett: バフェット：「金は何も生産しない。金庫に眠るだけ。同じお金で全米の農地かエクソンモービルが買える — 絶対に金は買わない。」
gold.when_good: インフレ、ドル安、地政学的危機、中央銀行への不信（スタグフレーション時に最強）
gold.when_bad: ドル高、実質金利の急騰（金は利息を生まない — 機会費用が上昇）
gold.tip: ダリオの勝ち。バフェットの「無生産」批判は正当だが、分散効果と危機ヘッジ価値は実証済み。12%を維持。

commodity.title: コモディティ
commodity.role: インフレを直接反映する資産。石油、農産物、金属を含む。
commodity.dalio: ダリオ All Weather：「コモディティを7.5%保有。インフレ時にコモディティがポートフォリオを守る。」
commodity.buffett: バフェット：「コモディティETFは買わない。しかしエネルギー企業（シェブロン、オキシデンタル）は保有 — コモディティ自体より収益が重要。」
commodity.when_good: インフレ、供給ショック、ドル安、地政学的紛争時
commodity.when_bad: 不況/デフレ（需要減 → コモディティ価格下落）
commodity.tip: バフェットはETFよりエネルギー株を好む。コモディティETF（PDBC, DJP）はダリオ方式 — 目標8%。

cash.title: 現金
cash.role: 機会のための弾薬。押し目買いの資金。短期流動性を確保します。
cash.dalio: ダリオ：「現金はゴミだ。長期保有するとインフレが価値を蝕む — 最小限に留めよ。」
cash.buffett: バフェット：「バークシャーは常に200億ドル以上の現金を保持。恐怖がピークの時に現金を持つ者が勝つ。」
cash.when_good: 市場暴落直前、投資機会待ち、計画的な出費の前
cash.when_bad: インフレ時（現金の実質購買力が毎年減少）
cash.tip: バフェットの勝ち。10%を機会のための弾薬として保持。ダリオは最小化したいが、暴落時の買いには10%が必要。

realestate.title: 🏠 不動産
realestate.role: 非流動性の長期資産。ポートフォリオの基盤 — リバランスの対象外。
realestate.dalio: ダリオ：「実物資産は金融危機時のバッファー。インフレ時に購買力を保全 — ただしLTV管理が鍵。」
realestate.buffett: バフェット：「不動産は良い投資だが私の専門外。優良企業の株式が直接不動産投資に勝る。自宅購入は優れた財務判断。」
realestate.when_good: インフレ、低金利、人口増加地域（実質価値を保全）
realestate.when_bad: 急激な利上げ、人口減少、信用危機（高LTVは強制売却リスク）
realestate.tip: 両者とも自宅所有に賛成。流動資産のリバランスから除外し、別途管理。LTVは60%以下に。

• Profanity, personal attacks, hate speech, doxxing
